case_title: AGP 626 POWELL, LLC VS. CASSIE HANSON ET AL

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AGP 626 POWELL, LLC , A DELAWARE LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HANSON, CASSIE , AN INDIVIDUAL THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 626 POWELL STREET, APARTMENT 205, CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, STATE OF CALIFORNIA, 94108, LEASE FORFEITED, ***INCLUDE ALL UNKNOWN OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES INTO THE JUDGMENT*** SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
